default_burst.name: Mana burst
default_burst.description: At 100 mana, unleashes a heavy hit that scales with attack damage.

base_money_farm.name: Cashout
base_money_farm.description: Generates extra in-run money when cast.

base_assassin_burst.name: Assassinate
base_assassin_burst.description: A massive burst that scales with attack damage.

base_bruiser_sustain.name: Overwhelm
base_bruiser_sustain.description: Hits hard and heals the caster.

base_tank_heal.name: Fortify
base_tank_heal.description: Heals the caster for a large amount.

base_buff_round.name: Rally
base_buff_round.description: Buffs the nearest allies' damage for the round.

base_healer_aoe.name: Mend
base_healer_aoe.description: Heals you and the three nearest allies for 25% of each unit's max health.
